title: phlegmariurus pseudovarius
intro: Phlegmariurus pseudovarius, also known as the pseudovarious horsetail, is a species of club moss within the family Lycopodiaceae. It is a type of evergreen, perennial plant native to China and Southeast Asia, known for its medicinal and health benefits. The plant contains bioactive compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In traditional Chinese medicine, Phlegmariurus pseudovarius is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies for its purported health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory discomfort.
